name: Escrow Market
description: Escrowed-delivery marketplace starbridge-app: a factory-born escrow cell composing TRUSTLINE (escrowed <= ceiling) + MAILBOX (write-once sealed delivery) + FLASHWELL (conserving settlement) + LIFECYCLE (one-way LISTED -> FUNDED -> SHIPPED -> SETTLED), re-enforced by the verified executor every turn.

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.publish: Signature (the escrow cell is a dregg:// sturdyref an auditor on another federation reacquires)

affordances.view_escrow: cap-only, Signature (an OBSERVER reads the order state)
affordances.fund: GATED (cap∧state), Either — listed precondition (STATE == LISTED); the fire submits the FULL fund (buyer + escrowed + state->FUNDED), the executor re-enforcing TRUSTLINE FieldLteField(ESCROWED <= CEILING)
affordances.ship: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — funded precondition (STATE == FUNDED); the fire submits the FULL ship (delivery + state->SHIPPED), the executor re-enforcing MAILBOX WriteOnce(DELIVERY_HASH)
affordances.settle: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — shipped precondition (STATE == SHIPPED); the fire reads live ESCROWED and releases it in full (state->SETTLED), the executor re-enforcing FLASHWELL AffineEq(RELEASED + REFUNDED == ESCROWED)

deos.rights_ladder: Signature ⊂ Either ⊂ None IS the observer ⊂ buyer ⊂ seller ladder
deos.seam: CLOSED — the fire runs against the seeded escrow cell carrying the full escrow program (TRUSTLINE + MAILBOX + FLASHWELL + LIFECYCLE), so an OVER-CEILING fund (FieldLteField), a VALUE-CONJURING settle (AffineEq/AffineLe), and a NON-ADVANCING state (StrictMonotonic, strict) all BITE in the deos fire path (tests/deos_seam.rs — the three headline teeth)
